indicators.name: large L-shaped desk blocking floor
indicators.rationale: The desk occupies the majority of the floor space, leaving little room for a yoga mat or any stretching.

indicators.name: bookshelves lining all walls
indicators.rationale: The bookshelves reduce the available floor space and create visual clutter, making it difficult to focus on a yoga practice.

indicators.name: stacks of papers and boxes on floor
indicators.rationale: The floor is cluttered with papers and boxes, obstructing any potential floor space for yoga or stretching.

indicators.name: no open floor area visible
indicators.rationale: There is no unobstructed floor area visible, making it impossible to perform yoga or stretching.

indicators.name: high visual noise from clutter
indicators.rationale: The dense visual clutter makes it difficult to focus on a yoga practice and creates a distracting environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the lack of open floor space and the high level of visual clutter. The presence of a large desk and bookshelves lining the walls obstructs any potential floor area, and the clutter on the floor makes it impossible to perform any stretching or yoga practice.
